content: Alex Walton brings a unique blend of technical expertise and creative flair to his writing. He thrives on delving into the world of science, technology, and gaming, always striving to share knowledge in an engaging way. In his spare time, Alex enjoys tinkering with electronics and exploring the latest virtual realities.

Kathryn Jackson writes about AI, cybersecurity, and consumer tech for Engant, with a focus on what emerging technology actually means for the people and companies using it. She previously worked in enterprise IT before moving to full-time tech journalism.

Nilima Nike covers robotics, space, and biotech for Engant, translating dense research papers and mission updates into stories anyone can follow. When not writing, she's usually reading conference proceedings or tracking the next launch window.
